ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the part (e.g., Saddles, Mudguards, Wheels, Bags) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the part */,
  "part_sku" TEXT /* Unique stock-keeping unit for each part */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the part */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the part */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the part */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the part is made of */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the part */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty period for the part */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the minimum level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy level of the warehouse */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part in inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the part is stored */,
  "new_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of new parts in stock */,
  "existing_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of existing parts in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "threshold_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a low stock alert */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled stock check */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder (e.g., pending, ordered, received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part sold */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the part was sold */,
  "new_sales" INTEGER /* Quantity of new parts sold */,
  "existing_sales" INTEGER /* Quantity of existing parts sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "salesperson" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "salesperson_email" TEXT /* Email of the salesperson */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer about the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Customer's preferred brand */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Customer's preferred category of parts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse fulfilling the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, expedited) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the part */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the part in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the part in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the part in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part involved in the transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., receipt, shipment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of parts in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID (e.g., order ID, supplier ID) */,
  "transaction_note" TEXT /* Any notes related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the transaction (e.g., shipping, handling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers_parts" (
  "supplier_part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-part relationship */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part provided by the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier for the specific part */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the part from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_parts_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_parts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
